name: Helm of the Juggernaut
description: Notes The Helm of the Juggernaut is an elusive helm, trading Speedy for the Armored status. Armored gives +50% effective defense. A maxed warrior with tiered armor can easily reach 90-100 DEF, allowing them to eat lots of bullets at no great risk, at least in easier dungeons.
effects: On party: Berserk for 2.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 30) seconds On self: Armored for 2.5 (+0.1 per WIS over 30) seconds
